title: paulownia × taiwaniana
intro: Paulownia × taiwaniana, a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Paulownia kawakamii and Paulownia tomentosa, is a member of the Paulownia family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Paulownia × taiwaniana include its ability to improve respiratory function, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant's leaves and flowers are commonly used in traditional herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma.
